mapping_rationale: DANDI/NWB core provenance: institution on NWBFile.

mapping_rationale: NWB experimenter; use string or length-1 array per PyNWB.
NWBFile.session_id where schema provides it; ties to session record.

units: single letter M F O U

mapping_rationale: Subject.age expects ISO-8601 duration; convert days to P{n}D.

units: full datatype ID for session clock reference
mapping_rationale: Value names one stream (e.g. lfp spikeTimes GCaMP7f_traces); all other streams align to this clock.

mapping_rationale: Brain region at session level often in Subject.description or session text until ElectrodeGroup exists.
Append to session_description; trial types detailed in trial table stage.
Unique NWB identifier; typically concatenate animal_ID and session_ID or use session_ID if globally unique.
notes: Not a SurLab column; conversion generates.

mapping_rationale: One sessionInfo column per traces stream; header is full datatype ID (e.g. GCaMP7f_traces).
notes: No aggregate traces column. Prefix before _traces is informative only. See stage 3; substitute <datatypeID> per stream.
At most one trialInfo table per session. See stage 5 rows.
LFP rows deferred (future stage 6).
When 1 expect spikeTimes files; see stage 2 conditional rows.
Defer spike waves per project plan.
Optional prefix on datatype ID (e.g. lick_behEvents) same convention as traces.

mapping_rationale: One sessionInfo column per behTSeries stream; header is full datatype ID (e.g. pupil_behTSeries).
notes: No aggregate behTSeries column. See stage 4; substitute <datatypeID> per stream.

mapping_rationale: Rule: preserve name and value into experiment_description block or LabMetaData; document in README.
notes: Single generic row; same rule for all extras.

mapping_rationale: Session-local copy of sessionInfo; identical mapping after row selection for that session.
notes: One session one row; join key animal_ID session_ID.

mapping_rationale: PDF stays external; copy abstract into session_description or cite in notes.
notes: Optional; DANDI stores PDFs as separate assets.

units: spike times per unit in seconds relative to session zero_time
mapping_rationale: Kilosort-style: one unit per row; spike_times in seconds aligned to NWB session clock.
notes: Optional middle tokens allowed in filename; same variable layout as SurLab spec.

mapping_rationale: Optional DynamicTable column on Units for display; or fold into unit description.
notes: Prefer sessionInfo duplicate when schema deprecated.

mapping_rationale: Document layout; often neurons or time not stored on NWB Units.
Should match number of units and metadata rows.
Omitted for spikeTimes per SurLab (times in arrays).
Supports alignment with raw ecephys; not same as spike time axis.
Map to Device object; link Units to device when geometry added later.
Often spikeGLX; store on Device or session_description.
Kilosort precedent: name sorting module and software in processing description or module.
No single core filter object; use notes or ecephys extension if used.
Documents meaning of per-unit quality column.

units: integer or text id per unit
mapping_rationale: Units table id column; align rows to spike array order.

notes: One generic row for unlisted metadata columns.

mapping_rationale: SurLab explicitly does not use a separate timestamps file for spikeTimes; times live in data arrays.

notes: Required for traces (unlike spikeTimes).

mapping_rationale: Fluorescence often arbitrary or deltaF/F; document in schema.
